summary: Non-authoring r3 build sign-off for v1.0.1 activation tuning. Independently verified: enforcement LOCKSTEP (grep -Eqi + char-class strips // re.IGNORECASE matchers + strips; self-assembled shim literals — dmc-branch emit prefix byte-identical to the router up to the task token; em-dash wire-encoding difference content-neutral and A16-neutralized); parser line + dmc-off/plan emits untouched (greeting dmc-only); A16 = 34 rows with fresh sandboxes + seeded sentinel + shape-robust extraction (over-satisfies r2-A5); frozen fixture + 4 parity surfaces byte-unchanged; B1 v011 re-run 39/2 EXACTLY with the two named pre-existing rows; B2 LP1 re-run 10/10 incl. clean extraction; docs/skill/HONEST_SCOPE §4/MILESTONES landed. G4 OVERRIDE scrutinized against the FROZEN source: DMC_GATE_PROTECTED is the tool's designed override (runner :21/:37, DMC_GATE_CHECKS.md:48); 9 of 10 protected entries retained; runner unedited; env-scoped. Authorization adequate (human gate + landmark_authorized scope.lock + critic chain + verifier). Laundering structurally mitigated: sg_landmark FLAGs independently of the override — the readiness still marks router+shim+MILESTONES for review. Gate integrity: schema-valid, 9/9 (8 PASS + FLAG), approvals CF2, 3 receipts cover the 3 checks. Scope: 10 staged == 10 grants, 177/20 within bounds. 0 blockers; 2 disclosure advisories (A7 write-once FAIL-readiness removal stated explicitly; A8 precedent guardrail recorded) — both folded into the build evidence by the orchestrator upon receipt.

Precedent guardrail: the DMC_GATE_PROTECTED override is legitimate ONLY under a landmark-authorized scope.lock + human gate + critic/verifier chain; must not be cited to bypass G4 for unauthorized hook changes (folded into evidence). landmark-flag remains the structural backstop.
